evals.name: high-severity
evals.prompt: Show me the high-severity namespace governance problems across the fleet.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-namespace preflight` then `cub-namespace findings --severity high` and reports the high findings (missing-default-deny, duplicate-namespace) with their namespaces/clusters. Read-only.

evals.name: duplicate-namespaces
evals.prompt: Are any namespaces defined twice on the same cluster?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-namespace findings --analyzer duplicate-namespace` and reports duplicate-namespace collisions (name + Target), or states there are none.

evals.name: scoped-to-cluster
evals.prompt: What namespace issues does prod-cluster have?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-namespace findings --cluster prod-cluster` and reports the findings for that cluster, ranked by severity.

evals.name: routes-inventory-elsewhere
evals.prompt: How many namespaces do we have per cluster?
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this is an inventory question, not a findings scan, and routes to namespace-audit / `cub-namespace snapshot` rather than running findings.
